untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ML-predicted Expected Strangle Return threshold and explicit put/call leg validation, neither of which are available as allowed indicators. The ML model output and options-specific strangle combination validation cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators.
translation_notes: Substituted high volatility proxy conditions (hvol_20 and india_vix) as approximation for strangle suitability. Used typical stop loss (2%) and profit target thresholds based on short strangle strategy conventions. Original signal is fundamentally untranslatable without ML model outputs and options data.
